case_title: BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC VS DOWDELL, DEBBIE E.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $512.37 FILED BY BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC AS TO DEFENDANT DOWDELL, DEBBIE E. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DOWDELL, DEBBIE E.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOWDELL, DEBBIE E. $512.37 PRINCIPAL, $54.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $566.87 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DOWDELL, DEBBIE E.
NOT. OF OPPOSITION TO CLAIM OF EXEMPTION FILED. HRG. SET FOR 05-AUG-94, 9:00 AM DEPT 6, 376.
IT IS ORDERED: LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE $150 HELD TO JUDGMENT DEBTOR. LEVING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE $150 HELD TO
THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT. OTHER ORDERS: GRANTED,EXCEPT FOR THE SUM OF $25.00 TO BE WITHHELD FROM EACH PAY PERIOD.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT DOWDELL, DEBBIE E.
